Log:

Modified: head/www/node/Makefile

+++ head/www/node/Makefile	Sun May 26 13:50:39 2013	(r319110)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	node
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.8
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://nodejs.org/dist/v${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-v${PORTVERSION}
